tasks.name: V2 schema + strict deny core implementation
tasks.description: Implement PolicySnapshotV2 + policy schema V2, helper deny masking, and strict-mode bypass prevention for Linux full isolation.
acceptance_criteria: All contract.md MUST statements are implemented
World-agent rejects PolicySnapshotV1 and accepts PolicySnapshotV2 only
Strict deny prevents mount/umount bypass attempts by the workload in full isolation
start_checklist: Read: contract.md, SCHEMA.md, PROTOCOL.md, ENV.md, SECURITY.md
Confirm: full isolation only (no workspace support for deny/enforcement)
No backwards compatibility: legacy keys and PolicySnapshotV1 must hard error
end_checklist: Update integration_map.md if code landmarks drift
Ensure contract.md remains the conflict resolver (fix docs drift if found)

tasks.name: V2 schema + strict deny tests
tasks.description: Add unit and integration tests that enforce the V2 schema and strict deny semantics in full isolation.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover schema hard errors (legacy keys, invalid patterns, workspace deny disallowed)
Integration tests cover deny-overrides-allow and strict bypass prevention on Linux full isolation
start_checklist: Map tests to requirements_traceability.md Req IDs
Decide gating behavior for kernels without Landlock support (fail closed vs skip) per contract
end_checklist: Update requirements_traceability.md with any new stable requirement IDs
Ensure tests are stable and deterministic

tasks.name: Linux full isolation integration validation
tasks.description: Run Linux full isolation integration checks (deny-overrides-allow, discover vs read, strict bypass prevention) and record evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Manual playbook Cases 1-4 pass on Linux full isolation
Strict bypass attempt fails as specified
start_checklist: Run targeted tests for the changed crates (broker, shell, world-agent, world)
Run manual playbook cases in a small test workspace
end_checklist: Update quality_gate_report.md from PENDING to PASS where appropriate
Record any deviations as failures (no optional behaviors)
